summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of WayofDojo Ceintures page - Technique details with YouTube video links feature. All 9 features tested and working correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: TechniqueDetailCard.tsx correctly implements expandable technique cards with video links
video-links.ts contains well-structured YouTube video data for ukemi techniques (mae_ukemi, ushiro_ukemi, yoko_ukemi, zenpo_kaiten_ukemi) and tai sabaki (irimi, tenkan, irimi_tenkan)
YouTube links properly use target='_blank' and rel='noopener noreferrer' for security
Event propagation bug was correctly fixed - clicking on technique no longer closes parent grade card
data-testid attributes properly implemented: technique-{id}, grade-card-{id}
Points clés and Erreurs à éviter sections display correctly with appropriate icons (CheckCircle2 for points, XCircle for errors)
Alternative videos section ('Autres vidéos') displays correctly when available
seed_data_creation: No seed data created - using static data from video-links.ts
context_for_next_testing_agent: Technique details with YouTube video links feature fully tested. The TechniqueDetailCard component correctly displays: description, Points clés, Erreurs à éviter, primary YouTube video link, and alternative videos. YouTube icons (red) appear next to techniques that have video links. Event propagation issue was fixed by moving onClick handler to header only.

tanaka_modal_close.details: Tanaka modal closed successfully by clicking 'C'est parti !' button with confetti animation

6e_kyu_grade_expansion.details: 6e Kyu grade card expands correctly showing Objectifs, Mouvements requis, Techniques requises, Critères d'évaluation

voir_techniques_en_detail.details: 'Voir les techniques en détail' section expands correctly showing 18 techniques organized by category

mae_ukemi_expansion.details: Mae Ukemi technique expands correctly showing full details

content_verified.description: Chute avant roulée sur l'épaule et le dos...
points_cles: Contact: main → avant-bras → épaule → dos → hanche
Rouler en diagonale, jamais sur la colonne
Menton rentré pour protéger la tête

points_cles_display.details: 'Points clés' section displays correctly with green checkmark icons

erreurs_a_eviter_display.details: 'Erreurs à éviter' section displays correctly with red X icons

youtube_primary_video_link.details: Primary YouTube video link displays correctly

example.video_title: How to do MAE UKEMI (front roll) in AIKIDO [TUTORIAL]

youtube_link_new_tab.details: YouTube links have target='_blank' and rel='noopener noreferrer' for security

alternative_videos_display.details: 'Autres vidéos' section displays correctly with alternative video links

youtube_icon_display.details: YouTube icons (red) display correctly next to techniques with videos

ushiro_ukemi_video.details: Ushiro Ukemi has correct YouTube video link

yoko_ukemi_video.details: Yoko Ukemi has correct YouTube video link
